title: The Cool Mikado
writer: Michael Winner, Maurice Browning, W.S. Gilbert
actors: Frankie Howerd, Stubby Kaye, Mike Winters
plot: Hank, the son of American judge Herbert Mikado, refuses to marry Katie Shaw, whom his father wishes him to marry, and so joins the army. He is stationed in Japan where he falls in love with a Tokyo art student, Yum-Yum.
